mapper.select:
SELECT VNGL.GATE_CD , VNCM.BUYER_CD ,(SELECT CUST_NM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = VNCM.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = VNCM.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG AS PROGRESS_CD , GETCOMCODE(VNCM.GATE_CD, 'M019', VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_NM , VNGL.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , VNGL.IRS_NO , VNGL.COMPANY_REG_NO , (VNCM.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DATE , VNGL.INDUSTRY_TYPE , VNGL.BUSINESS_TYPE , VNGL.TEL_NO AS TEL_NO , (VNCM.CONFIRM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CONFIRM_DATE , VNGL.CREDIT_CD , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP003', VNGL.CREDIT_CD, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS CREDIT_NM , VNCM.CONFIRM_REASON AS REJECT_RMK FROM STOCVNGL VNGL JOIN STOCVNCM VNCM ON (VNCM.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND VNCM.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE VNGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND VNGL.REG_TYPE = #{REG_TYPE}
AND UPPER(VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(VNGL.IRS_NO) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{IRS_NO}) '%'
AND VNCM.REG_DATE >= (#{REG_FROM_DATE})
AND VNCM.REG_DATE <= (#{REG_TO_DATE})
AND VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG = #{PROGRESS_CD}
ORDER BY VNGL.REG_DATE DESC, VNCM.VENDOR_CD, VNCM.BUYER_CD
